name: Find Peak Element
description: A peak element is an element strictly greater than its neighbors. Given an integer array nums, find a peak element and return its index. If the array contains multiple peaks, return the index of any of them. You must write an algorithm that runs in O(log n) time.
constraints: 1 <= nums.length <= 1000. -2^31 <= nums[i] <= 2^31 - 1. nums[i] != nums[i + 1] for all valid i.
